LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TRANSBAY JOINT POWERS AUTHORITY'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF TERRI BROWN'S COMPLAINT FOR INVERSE CONDEMNATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS THAT THE AGENCY WENT BEYOND THE PLANNING STAGE TO THE ACQUIRING STAGE. TERMINALS EQUIPMENT CO. VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (1990) 221 CAL.APP.3D 234. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Off Calendar, per dismissal. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TRANSBAY JOINT POWERS AUTHORITY'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF TERRI BROWN'S COMPLAINT FOR INVERSE CONDEMNATION.
APPEARANCES: Dwight C. Donovan, Esq. of MBV Law LLP 781-4400 for pltf & opposing party; Winter King, Esq. of Shute, Mihaly & Weinberger LLP 552-7272 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend to plead facts that the agency went beyond the planning stage to the acquiring stage. Terminals Equipment Co. vs. City and County of San Francisco (1990) 221 Cal.App.3d 234. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
